topic: VIX current level and recent history
summary: VIX at 14.51 on Jan 2, 2026. Declining trend from 28.27 spike on Nov 20 to current lows near 14.5. Holiday period Dec 22-Jan 2 saw max high of only 15.42.
content: VIX closed at 14.51 on Jan 2, 2026. Recent 3-month history shows decline from late Nov spike (28.27 high on Nov 20) through steady decline to 14.5 area. The Dec 22-Jan 2 biweekly period was very calm with max high of only 15.42. Daily volatility calibrated at ~6.1% of level, high/close ratio averages 1.075. Key upcoming catalysts for Jan 19-30: FOMC meeting (~Jan 28-29), Q4 earnings season, post-holiday trading resumption.
